tooltip: Select Jellyf as your hero of choice.

heroSelectionDescriptionElements.tooltipText: Jellyf focuses on improving Jellyfish and Octorok units.
Allows you to summon Jellyf, a Stealth hero with a blinding ranged attack.
Access to Bigoctos, relatively small siege creature, Parella, a support ranged unit, and Barihost, a parella that specializes in Assassinations.
Octorok Caves can be deepend for increased defensive and supportive capabilities
